creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is <freebsd-ports@evilcode.net> an alias for <sjg@evilcode.net> ?

On Mon, Sep 20, 2010 at 02:20:04 +0000, Samuel J. Greear wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/150713; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: "Samuel J. Greear" <sjg@evilcode.net>
> To: bug-followup <bug-followup@freebsd.org>
> Cc: freebsd-ports <freebsd-ports@evilcode.net>
> Subject: Re: ports/150713: [PATCH] multimedia/mediainfo: update to 0.7.35
> Date: Sun, 19 Sep 2010 19:46:33 -0600
> 
>  Looks ok.
>  
>  On Sat, Sep 18, 2010 at 11:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote=
>  :
>  > Maintainer of multimedia/mediainfo,
>  >
>  > Please note that PR ports/150713 has just been submitted.
>  >
>  > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  > and a committer will take care of it.
>  >
>  > The full text of the PR can be found at:
>  > =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/150713
>  >
>  > --
>  > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  > edwin@FreeBSD.org
>  >

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
http://lwhsu.org
